ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: !ISNEW() && ( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Accepted") || ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Completed") || ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Accepted") || ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Completed") || ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Cancelled") || ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Declined") ) && LEFT(Reply_To_Contact__c,15) != LEFT($User.ContactId, 15)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only the Posting Contact can set the status to 'Accepted' or 'Completed'. Additionally, statuses of 'Cancelled / Declined' cannot be changed.
